question_text: Involves eyes mouth or genitals (mucosal involvement)?
New medication started within last 2-8 weeks?
Facial swelling or swelling around eyes/lips?
Recent sick contacts or viral symptoms?
Tick bite or possible tick exposure?
Rash in a ring or bullseye pattern?
Pus or abscess (drainage or fluctuant area)?
Bite cut wound or recent trauma?
History of MRSA or recurrent skin infections?
Allergic reaction symptoms (hives throat swelling wheeze)?
Pain with eye movement or vision changes (if near eye)?
Throat closing sensation or tongue/lip swelling?
Vomiting or severe diarrhea with hives?
New medication or food exposure today?
Symptoms started within 2 hours of exposure?
Any mucosal involvement or skin peeling?
